title: Filtering board for a group of people or certain team members
excerpt: I have tasks assigned to my team members, but I like to know what tasks are assigned to certain group of people. Currently, I can’t select multiple people to filter my board.

posts.author: Arjun21 (Arjun Sathya)
posts.cookedHtml: I have tasks assigned to my team members, but I like to know what tasks are assigned to certain group of people. Currently, I can’t select multiple people to filter my board.

posts.author: dnmonday (Desmond)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Arjun,

I’m assuming you’re using the “Person” option.
If you move over and use “Filter,” you’ll be able to select multiple people within the same filter. Note that this doesn’t save to the main view, so if you refresh or leave the board, you’ll have to apply the filter again unless you save it as a view.
